objective: Locate the verified business mechanism causing planning gaps, especially target/path propagation, without treating static probes or source presence as root-cause evidence.
review: Compare Current and Draft on finding correctness, evidence linkage to current business execution, competing-stage exclusion, reviewer acceptance, unresolved honesty, control-case behavior, and avoid expected-answer calculators or irrelevant source traversal.

iterations.reason: Draft selected the correct parser and workflow-handoff tools and completed the neighboring 亿 case, but the 5亿 case reviewer correctly rejected the finding because the handoff receipt did not expose which resolver/extractor calls actually ran. The candidate also reread redundant source and consumed excessive context. Solidify must add execution-path instrumentation to the handoff receipt and tell Attribute to stop once public SSE, parser call, resolver branch and handoff align.

On the frozen live cases, Draft converted the primary 5亿 case from Current unresolved to a reviewer-passed finding that links public SSE, executed parser output, observed deterministic rule/clarification calls and PlanningStarted handoff. The 1.2亿 neighbor also completed with reviewer acceptance, while the 300万 fulfilled control remained not_applicable with no Tool use. No evidence registration or infrastructure errors occurred. Draft cost remains variable, but quality is proven better without a case-specific expected-answer calculator.
